Video.summary: Begin your understanding of Europe as not only a place but as an evolving laboratory of ideas.
Video.title: The Idea and Place of Europe

Image.alt: The Idea and Place of Europe
The Idea and Place of Europe
The Idea and Place of Europe

Video.summary: Gain a firm foundation for understanding the medieval world with this introduction to feudalism.
Video.title: Feudalism and the Medieval World

Video.summary: Meet Charles the Great, the Carolingian king who would become Charlemagne.
Video.title: The Making of Emperor Charles the Great

Image.alt: The Making of Emperor Charles the Great
The Making of Emperor Charles the Great
The Making of Emperor Charles the Great

Video.summary: Go back to the formative years of Charlemagne's life before he ascended to the imperial throne.
Video.title: Charlemagne as Heir and King, 748-800

Video.summary: Examine the common preconceptions about Celtic identity.
Video.title: Who Are the Celts?

Video.summary: Our earliest written records of the Celts come from Italy, Greece, and Spain.
Video.title: The Celts and the Classical World

Image.alt: The Celts and the Classical World
The Celts and the Classical World
The Celts and the Classical World

Video.summary: Uncover the truth about the Achaemenid Persian Empire: an "empire of information."
Video.title: Rethinking the Persian Empire

Video.summary: In this episode, explore how we\'ve come to know the Persian Empire.
Video.title: Questioning the Sources

Video.summary: See how Western imperialism, the politics of oil, and the push for a Jewish state all set the stage for the 20th century.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Middle East in the 20th Century
Video.title: A Middle East Crossroads in the Year 1990

Image.alt: A Middle East Crossroads in the Year 1990
A Middle East Crossroads in the Year 1990
A Middle East Crossroads in the Year 1990

Video.summary: Look at how protests in Persia led to a new government. Then meet the Young Turks who wanted a united Turkey to supersede the Ottoman Empire.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Middle East in the 20th Century
Video.title: Constitutional Revolts in Persia and Turkey

Image.alt: Constitutional Revolts in Persia and Turkey
Constitutional Revolts in Persia and Turkey
Constitutional Revolts in Persia and Turkey

Video.summary: Octavian, after the Battle of Actium, soon achieves one-man rule over Rome.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Roman Empire: From Augustus to the Fall of Rome
Video.title: Dawn of the Roman Empire

Video.summary: Learn how Octavian\'s political innovations are astonishing historical feats.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Roman Empire: From Augustus to the Fall of Rome
Video.title: Augustus, the First Emperor

Video.summary: Examine the visual nature of Roman society and the role of spectacle.
Video.grandparentTitle: Experiencing Rome: A Visual Exploration of Antiquity's Greatest Empire
Video.title: Rome-A Spectacular Civilization

Video.summary: Learn to understand the visual components of the Roman Empire.
Video.grandparentTitle: Experiencing Rome: A Visual Exploration of Antiquity's Greatest Empire
Video.title: A Brief Survey of the Roman Empire

Image.alt: A Brief Survey of the Roman Empire
A Brief Survey of the Roman Empire
A Brief Survey of the Roman Empire

Video.summary: Investigate the turbulent events that marked the beginning of the Middle Ages.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Middle Ages around the World
Video.title: Medieval Beginnings: The Fall of Empires

Image.alt: Medieval Beginnings: The Fall of Empires
Medieval Beginnings: The Fall of Empires
Medieval Beginnings: The Fall of Empires

Video.summary: Grasp the vital relationship between sophisticated cities and the people who supported their existence.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Middle Ages around the World
Video.title: Constantinople, Aksum, and Tang China

Video.summary: Explore the early church and investigate the roots of Christianity.
Video.title: From Jesus to the Creation of the Church

Image.alt: From Jesus to the Creation of the Church
From Jesus to the Creation of the Church
From Jesus to the Creation of the Church

Video.summary: Glimpse the first Christian communities in early Christian documents.
Video.title: The First Christian Institutions

Video.summary: Learn how believers adapted their faith to create a diversity of worship.
Video.title: Christianities in the Early Church

Video.summary: Learn how widespread Christian persecution led to the martyred saints.
Video.title: Persecution and Saints

Video.summary: See how Constantine\'s adoption of Christianity affected believers.
Video.title: Peace between Empire and Church

Video.summary: Examine the origin and impact of institutional revolutions in the church.
Video.title: Institutional and Doctrinal Developments

Video.summary: Examine the rich developments of Latin church theology.
Video.title: Latin Theology, Including Augustine

Video.summary: Learn how the church led in the chaos following the fall of Roman authority.
Video.title: Popes and Bishops in the Early Middle Ages

Image.alt: Popes and Bishops in the Early Middle Ages
Popes and Bishops in the Early Middle Ages
Popes and Bishops in the Early Middle Ages
